description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you are adjacent to an ally who also has this feat, you can move into your allyâs square as part of normal movement. At the same time, your ally moves into your previous space as an immediate action. Both you and your ally must be willing and able to move to take advantage of this feat. Your ally must be the same size as you to utilize this feat. Your ally does not provoke an attack of opportunity from this movement, but you provoke as normal. This movement does not count against your allyâs movement on his next turn.
